note: 58-year-old female, BMI 45.2 (height 5'4", weight 263 lb). Documented morbid (severe) obesity. Discussion of bariatric referral declined. Continue weight management counseling and metformin for prediabetes.
notes: E66.01 (morbid obesity due to excess calories) + Z68.42 (BMI 45.0-49.9) — both required to capture the HCC and the qualifying BMI.
